title: cAn i MiNe thIS bLOCk?
description: this mod is for very smart people who need a mod to know if they can mine a block.
body:
This mod is for very smart people who need a mod to know if they can mine a block.

Adds a waila tooltip that looks similar to Waila Harvestability, however due to the nature of the fabric mining levels system, this mod is not a fork of Waila Harvestability.

### 1.19.3 - 1.20.1
This mod requires **WTHIT** (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wthit) OR **Jade** (https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jade), please install it before using this.
### 1.17 - 1.19.2
This mod requires **WTHIT** (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wthit), please install it before using this.
### 1.16
This mod requires **HWYLA** (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hwyla), please install it before using this.
